name: JobPilot Autofill
description: Fills job application forms from your JobPilot profile and attaches the documents written for that job. Runs only on the page you point it at.
//: There is no content_scripts block on purpose. The extension is not present on any page until you click its icon: nothing is injected, nothing watches, nothing runs. activeTab grants access to one tab, on your click, and only for that page.
